description_text: Features: This listing is for Four pieces of carbon fiber EVO front bumper canards splitters. Universal fit for most cars, Vans, Trucks And SUVs. It can protect your front side bumper from scratches or small bump damages. Come with self adhesive for simply to install It is durable and long lasting under any weather condition It will give you a high end luxury and eye-catching racing sporty look The car spoiler can reduce air resistance and air noise, and improve the stability of the vehicle during fast driving. As the exterior decoration of the car, improve the appearance of the car. Description: *Universal Front Bumper Splitter Fin Sets *Made of automotive grade ABS, not easy to crack and durable in use. *Quick way to add a spoiler/lip to any car for stylish look. *Stable screw mounting, easy to install on cars. *Through rigorous testing, to ensure it meets safety requirements. *Material: ABS *Placement: Front left and right(4pcs) *Size: Approx.Larger 370*200*160mm/14.6*7.9*6.3 Inch *Less 290*120*160mm/11.5*4.8*6.3 Inch Package Includes: 4 Pieces Front Bumper Spoilers Set 1 Piece of tape Installation method 1. Double-sided tape installation (please keep the car surface dry and clean before installation) 2. Screw installation (screw installation is more stable and firm)
